subject: Re: New condo
body:
address

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Do you have a particular name in mind for the llc. 
> In the past, the  llc has 
> been named after the address of the property.  Not
> particularly  imaginative, 
> but administratively makes it easier to keep track
> of.  
>  
> Consistent with the LLC for Walter's house and the
> LLC for Jim Forsbach's  
> house, I will form the LLC in Ohio.
>  
> Please let me know your preference for a name for
> the new llc, so I can get  
> it formed.  
>  
> Thanks.
>  
> Darren
>

body_html:
address

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Do you have a particular name in mind for the llc.
In the past, the llc has
been named after the address of the property. Not
particularly imaginative,
but administratively makes it easier to keep track
of.

Consistent with the LLC for Walter's house and the
LLC for Jim Forsbach's
house, I will form the LLC in Ohio.

Please let me know your preference for a name for
the new llc, so I can get
it formed.

Thanks.

Darren
